analysis.consistency: High. All fields are present and align with standard D&D 5e spell data structure.
analysis.quality: High. The data is clean, complete, and accurately transcribed.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (a pearl worth at least 100 gp and an owl feather)
mechanics.effect_summary: Provides detailed information about a touched magic item (properties, attunement needs, charges, current spells, creation spell) or reveals ongoing spells affecting a touched creature.
mechanics.material_component_cost: 100 gp (consumed/expended is not specified, but typically material components for rituals are not consumed unless stated)
mechanics.mechanics_notes: The 1-minute casting time combined with the 'ritual' tag is standard for utility spells that take time out of combat. The material component cost is significant for a 1st-level spell, emphasizing its utility role.
